scripts.test:security-only: cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/support/**/*.ts --require tests/step-definitions/**/*.ts features/test.feature --format json:reports/cucumber-report.json --format html:reports/cucumber-report.html
scripts.test:ui:browser: set PLAYWRIGHT_HEADLESS=0 && npx cucumber-js --require-module ts-node/register --require tests/support/**/*.ts --require tests/step-definitions/**/*.ts features/ui-security-validation.feature --format json:reports/cucumber-ui-report.json --format html:reports/cucumber-ui-report.html
scripts.posttest: npm run report:html && npm run report:ui:html && npm run open:report
